Notes: Baylake Bank Tip-Off Tournament Game #1...UWS will play in championship game
at 3 p.m. Saturday vs. St. Norbert/Martin Luther winner...DU will play in
consolation game at 1 p.m. Saturday vs. SNC/MLC loser.
Game.Location: Schuldes Sports Center - De Pere, Wis.
Game.Officials: Nick LoCicero,  Abby Bickel,  Tim Owens
